posts.title: Celebrating 55 years of being a Yankees fan

posts.title: Rice Ties It, Cole Deals 11 Ks, But the Pirates Escape With It in Extras, 5-3
posts.excerpt: Gerrit Cole fanned 11, Ben Rice tied it with a three-run blast, but the pen cracked in the 10th as the Pirates escaped Yankee Stadium, 5-3.

posts.title: Jazz Chisholm's Two-Homer Night Powers Yankees Past Pirates, 8-5
posts.excerpt: Jazz Chisholm crushed two homers and drove in five as the Yankees held off a Pirates rally for an 8-5 win at the Stadium.

posts.title: Yankees 1, Dodgers 2: One Slider to Muncy Undoes a Cole Gem
posts.excerpt: Max Muncy's 416-foot homer off Gerrit Cole in the seventh sent the Yankees to a 2-1 series-opening loss to the Dodgers.

posts.title: Ben Rice's 8th-Inning Triple Caps a Sweep in Washington
posts.excerpt: Ben Rice's go-ahead triple in the 8th lifted the Yankees past the Nats 5-3, completing a sweep and stretching the win streak to four before the break.

posts.title: Three Straight Homers in the 8th Lift Yankees Past Nationals, 4-2
posts.excerpt: Down 2-0 into the 8th, the Yankees crushed three straight homers off the Nationals bullpen to erase the deficit and win Game 2, 4-2.

posts.title: Yankees Have Shown Past Interest In Hunter Goodman
posts.excerpt: The Yankees are looking for catching help and Hunter Goodman of the Rockies is a speculative trade candidate. Jorge Castillo of ESPN reports that the Yankees have called the Rockies about Goodman, although not recently.

posts.title: Yankees got preview of Will Warren's new role, but it might be more of the same
posts.excerpt: The New York Yankees called on Will Warren to serve as an emergency closer, and the experience was all too familiar.

posts.title: Former MLB GM's mock Red Sox trade would be a Yankees' disaster of epic proportions
posts.excerpt: Jim Bowden's mock trade for a prime New York Yankees rival would be bad, and if combined with a popular division foe's rumor, we could be looking at a disaster.

posts.title: Former Yankees fan favorite reportedly on trade block and could solve bullpen issue
posts.excerpt: A former Yankees bullpen stalwart hits the trade block, and he'd be a picture-perfect fit that's more affordable than his higher-profile teammate.

posts.title: Pirates trade for former Yankees fan favorite, ditch recent Jose Caballero agitator
posts.excerpt: Ron Marinaccio is a Pittsburgh Pirate and the former New York Yankees reliever kicked Dennis Santana out of the Pirates bullpen.

posts.title: Jasson Dominguez's response to Yankees trade rumors is nice, but it won't matter
